calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn In Support Of First Amended Petition For Administrative Mandate
Off Calendar Dec-19-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alison B. Wilkinson, Esq., 415.259.6638, for plaintiff Evan Connor.
Larry Hecimovich, Deputy City Attorney, 415.554.3800, for defendant City and County of San Francisco.

RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT TOOK PETITIONER EVAN CONNOR'S Motion In Support Of First Amended Petition For Administrative Mandate UNDER SUBMISSION. Counsel for each party is ordered to submit to the court a proposed order via email (copying opposing counsel on email). Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.
